headline: FedEx announces the departure of CFO John W. Dietrich and the appointment of Claude F. Russ as Interim CFO, effective June 1, 2026.
investor_impact: The departure of CFO John Dietrich introduces near-term leadership uncertainty, though the explicit statement of no financial disagreements provides some downside protection. Investors will closely monitor the search for a permanent successor and rely on Interim CFO Claude Russ to maintain financial discipline during the transition.
key_figures: June 1, 2026 (Date Dietrich steps down and Russ assumes Interim CFO role)
$50,000 (One-time RSU award for Russ vesting over 3 years)
